message:
feat(wasm): real MessagePort and BroadcastChannel bindings for browser reactor

BrowserReactor is refactored to separate its inner state
(BrowserReactorInner) behind an Arc, enabling safe sharing with Web API
callbacks. Each reactor instance gets a unique ID via an atomic counter,
and host bindings are stored in a thread-local BTreeMap keyed by
(reactor_id, token).

Two binding types are implemented:
- MessagePortBinding: attaches onmessage/onmessageerror handlers that
  notify the reactor of READABLE/ERROR readiness when messages arrive
- BroadcastChannelBinding: same pattern for BroadcastChannel, enabling
  cross-tab/worker communication

Each binding stores its Closure instances to prevent them from being
garbage-collected while attached. The detach method nulls the handlers
and the Closures are dropped. BrowserHostBindingKind provides a label()
method for diagnostics.

browser-core crate: adds web-sys dependency with MessagePort and
BroadcastChannel features. Exports updated to include the new binding
types.

packages/browser-core: regenerated WASM artifacts (.wasm, .js, .d.ts)
to reflect the new exports.

packages/browser/src/index.ts: re-exports updated to match new binding
surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
